ai_summary: This regulatory disclosure from Art Nirman Limited's promoter, Mr. Ashokkumar Raghuram Thakker, confirms that the promoter group collectively holds 18,404,000 equity shares. Crucially, they have not encumbered any shares during the financial year ended March 31, 2026, which is a positive indicator of financial stability and promoter confidence in the company, presenting no red flags.
